messages.content: 什么是量子退相干

quantum decoherence is the loss of quantum coherence when a quantum system interacts with its environment it causes superposition to gradually collapse into classical mixed states decoherence is the main obstacle to building large scale quantum computers as it destroys quantum information
什么是Bell态

a bell state is a maximally entangled two qubit state there are four bell states the most common is one over root two times 00 plus 11 which means both qubits are perfectly correlated bell states are fundamental to quantum teleportation superdense coding and quantum cryptography
什么是量子测量

quantum measurement collapses a qubit from superposition into a definite state of 0 or 1 the probability of each outcome depends on the probability amplitudes before measurement the act of measurement irreversibly changes the quantum state this is the observer effect in quantum mechanics
什么是量子叠加

quantum superposition allows a qubit to exist in multiple states at once until measured mathematically a qubit state is a linear combination of basis states this property enables quantum parallelism where a quantum computer can evaluate many possibilities simultaneously
什么是量子门

a quantum gate is a basic operation on qubits similar to logic gates in classical computing common gates include hadamard which creates superposition pauli x y z for rotations cnot for entanglement and toffoli for reversible computing quantum gates are unitary matrices that preserve the norm of quantum states
什么是量子纠缠

quantum entanglement occurs when two or more qubits become correlated such that the state of one cannot be described independently of the others measuring one entangled qubit instantly determines the state of its partner regardless of distance this is used in quantum teleportation and quantum key distribution
什么是量子密钥分发

quantum key distribution or qkd uses quantum mechanics to securely share encryption keys the bb84 protocol sends qubits in random bases any eavesdropping disturbs the quantum states and can be detected qkd provides information theoretically secure communication that cannot be broken even by quantum computers
什么是量子比特

a qubit is the basic unit of quantum information unlike a classical bit that is either 0 or 1 a qubit can exist in a superposition of both states simultaneously this is represented as alpha times 0 plus beta times 1 where alpha and beta are complex probability amplitudes whose squares sum to 1
什么是量子傅里叶变换

the quantum fourier transform or qft is the quantum analogue of the discrete fourier transform it maps a quantum state to its frequency domain representation qft is a key subroutine in many quantum algorithms including shor factoring algorithm and quantum phase estimation it can be implemented with o n squared gates
什么是量子隐形传态

quantum teleportation transmits a quantum state from one location to another without physically moving the particle it uses a shared bell pair and two classical bits the original state is destroyed in the process but perfectly recreated at the destination this has been demonstrated over distances of hundreds of kilometers
